notes: New hire 2025 — initial AUP at onboarding + annual during cycle

Employee refused to sign AUP v4.0 on April 14 2025. Cited objection to Section 12 (personal device monitoring during remote work). System access was not provisioned per Section 5.3. Matter escalated to VP People Ops and General Counsel. Legal review case LEG-2025-0234 opened April 18. On May 2 the hiring manager (Patrick Dumont) submitted IT ticket TKT-2025-4891 requesting temporary access for CDH-8024 to complete a critical infrastructure migration project. IT provisioned access May 3 with manager approval. General Counsel review has not concluded as of August 31 2025 — 4.5 months. Employee has maintained system access since May 3 without signed AUP.
